title: AI Research Intern
description: Work alongside world-class researchers on cutting-edge AI models. Contribute to publications and prototype new architectures for natural language understanding and computer vision.

title: Full Stack Web Developer Intern
description: Build and maintain customer-facing web applications serving millions of users. Collaborate with product and design teams on new feature rollouts using React and Node.js.

title: Cybersecurity Analyst Intern
description: Assist the security operations team in monitoring enterprise networks, performing vulnerability assessments, and responding to incidents using industry-standard SIEM tools.

title: Data Science Intern
description: Analyse large-scale restaurant and delivery datasets to extract actionable insights. Build predictive models that improve delivery time estimation and customer recommendations.

title: Cloud Engineering Intern
description: Design, deploy, and manage cloud infrastructure for internal tooling. Work with EC2, S3, Lambda, and other core AWS services at production scale.

title: Machine Learning Intern
description: Develop and evaluate ML models for language understanding and accessibility features. Opportunity to publish research and work with distinguished scientists.

title: Android Developer Intern
description: Contribute to the PhonePe Android app used by 500M+ users. Implement new payment features, optimise app performance, and write unit tests.

title: DevOps Intern
description: Build and maintain CI/CD pipelines for a high-throughput payments platform. Automate infrastructure provisioning with Terraform and improve deployment reliability.

title: Blockchain Developer Intern
description: Develop and audit smart contracts on the Polygon network. Contribute to DeFi protocol integrations and developer tooling for the Web3 ecosystem.

title: IoT Engineering Intern
description: Prototype IoT solutions for smart manufacturing. Work with edge devices, sensor data pipelines, and cloud dashboards for real-time industrial monitoring.

title: UI/UX Design Intern
description: Redesign key user flows in the Swiggy app to improve conversion. Conduct user interviews, build prototypes in Figma, and work closely with front-end engineers.

title: Game Development Intern
description: Join a AAA game studio and work on gameplay systems. Implement mechanics, fix bugs, and collaborate with artists, designers, and audio engineers.

title: Frontend Developer Intern
description: Build accessible, performant UI components for Jira and Confluence. Work within a design system used by millions and ship features behind feature flags.

title: Data Engineer Intern
description: Build and optimise ETL pipelines processing billions of retail transaction records daily. Design data models on Hadoop and Spark for the analytics platform.

title: Cloud Security Intern
description: Evaluate cloud security posture across AWS and Azure environments. Automate compliance checks and contribute to the Prisma Cloud product security pipeline.

title: NLP Research Intern
description: Develop NLP models for Samsung's Bixby virtual assistant. Fine-tune transformers for intent detection, entity extraction, and multi-language support.

title: iOS Developer Intern
description: Build premium financial experiences on iOS for CRED's member base. Implement animations, integrate payment APIs, and maintain high App Store ratings.

title: MLOps Intern
description: Operationalise ML models powering Freshworks' AI-driven customer support products. Build reproducible training pipelines, model registries, and monitoring dashboards.

title: Backend Developer Intern
description: Develop low-latency backend services handling real-time stock market data for India's largest retail brokerage. Optimise APIs and database queries for sub-millisecond response times.

title: Computer Vision Intern
description: Optimise computer vision models for on-device inference on Snapdragon chipsets. Work on object detection, image segmentation, and model quantisation for edge deployment.

title: Software Engineer Intern - LLM Platform
description: Help build and scale the infrastructure behind GPT models. Work on API optimization, model serving pipelines, and developer tools for the world's most widely used AI platform.

title: Product Design Intern
description: Design features for the collaborative design tool used by millions. Participate in the full design process from research to pixel-perfect implementation.

title: Data Analytics Intern
description: Analyze user listening patterns to drive product decisions. Build dashboards, run A/B experiments, and collaborate with product managers to improve the music discovery experience.

title: Infrastructure Intern
description: Help build and maintain one of the world's largest edge networks. Work on DNS infrastructure, load balancing, and network performance optimization at massive scale.

title: Security Engineering Intern
description: Develop threat detection algorithms and security automation tools. Analyze malware samples and contribute to the Falcon endpoint protection platform.

title: React Native Developer Intern
description: Build mobile commerce features used by millions of merchants worldwide. Work on the Shop app and merchant-facing mobile tools using React Native.

title: Platform Engineering Intern
description: Contribute to open-source infrastructure tools used by millions of developers. Work on Terraform providers, Vault integrations, or Consul service mesh features.

title: Backend Engineer Intern - Payments
description: Build payment infrastructure that powers millions of businesses. Work on API design, database optimization, and distributed systems for financial transactions.

title: Robotics & AI Intern
description: Develop perception and navigation algorithms for Atlas and Spot robots. Work at the intersection of AI, computer vision, and mechanical engineering.

title: Site Reliability Engineering Intern
description: Keep Google's production systems running at 99.99% uptime. Build automation tools, improve monitoring, and respond to production incidents for core services.

title: Fintech Software Intern
description: Build scalable payment solutions processing ₹5L+ crore annually. Work on transaction processing, settlement systems, and merchant-facing APIs.

title: Natural Language Processing Intern
description: Improve AI-powered writing assistance used by 30M+ people daily. Work on grammar correction, tone detection, and text generation models.

title: Embedded Systems Intern
description: Design and test firmware for TI's microcontroller product line. Debug hardware-software interactions and optimize power consumption for IoT applications.

title: Flutter Developer Intern
description: Build cross-platform features for India's largest fantasy sports platform. Work on real-time updates, animations, and performance optimization for 200M+ users.

title: Full Stack Intern
description: Build developer tools and dashboard features for the platform powering Next.js deployments. Work with the creators of Next.js on cutting-edge web technology.

title: Quantum Computing Research Intern
description: Explore quantum algorithms for optimization and machine learning problems. Use IBM Qiskit to build and test quantum circuits on real quantum hardware.

title: Data Visualization Intern
description: Build interactive data visualization components for Tableau's analytics platform. Work with D3.js, WebGL, and large-scale data rendering techniques.

title: DeFi Protocol Intern
description: Contribute to one of the largest DeFi lending protocols. Develop and audit smart contracts, build governance tools, and work on multi-chain deployment strategies.

title: AR/VR Developer Intern
description: Build immersive AR/VR experiences for Meta Quest headsets. Work on spatial computing, hand tracking, and mixed reality applications.

title: Search Engineering Intern
description: Work on the Elasticsearch search engine used by thousands of companies. Optimize indexing performance, query processing, and distributed data replication.

title: ML Engineer Intern - Recommender Systems
description: Improve the recommendation algorithms that help 230M+ subscribers discover content. Work on personalization models, A/B testing frameworks, and real-time feature pipelines.

title: Cloud Native Intern
description: Contribute to OpenShift and Kubernetes projects. Build operators, improve container runtime performance, and work on cloud-native networking solutions.

title: Technical Writer Intern
description: Write tutorials and documentation for DigitalOcean's community. Create guides on cloud deployment, Docker, Kubernetes, and web application hosting.

title: Autonomous Vehicles Intern
description: Work on perception and planning systems for autonomous vehicles. Process sensor data from cameras and LiDAR, and train models for real-time object detection.

title: API Platform Intern
description: Build features for the API platform used by 25M+ developers. Work on API testing, documentation generation, and collaboration tools.

title: Edge Computing Intern
description: Work on edge computing solutions delivering content to billions of users. Optimize CDN performance, build edge functions, and improve cache efficiency.

title: Cybersecurity Research Intern
description: Analyze emerging malware threats and develop detection signatures. Research advanced persistent threats (APTs) and contribute to threat intelligence reports.

title: AI Ethics & Safety Intern
description: Research AI safety and alignment techniques. Develop evaluation frameworks for language model behavior and contribute to responsible AI development practices.

title: Supply Chain Analytics Intern
description: Optimize logistics operations using data science. Build route optimization models, demand forecasting systems, and real-time shipment tracking analytics.

title: Voice AI Intern
description: Build voice AI models for Indian languages. Work on automatic speech recognition, text-to-speech, and language translation for India's diverse linguistic landscape.
